tr.about_h1:
Köklü Mühendislik Disiplini.
Deneyimle şekillenen üretim anlayışı.

tr.cap_title_tag: Üretim Yetkinliği — ArmaWeld | EN 1090 EXC3 · EN ISO 3834-2
tr.cap_meta_desc: ArmaWeld üretim yetkinliği: EN 1090 EXC3 yapısal çelik, EN ISO 3834-2 kaynak kalitesi, malzeme grupları, NDT ve 48 saat teklif süreci. Konya tesisi.
tr.cap_intro: Bu sayfa, ArmaWeld'in Konya'daki tesisindeki gerçek üretim kapsamını özetler. Makine parkı listesi yerine sertifikalar, malzeme/proses yetkinliği ve teklif–teslim süreçleri şeffaf biçimde paylaşılır.
tr.cap_cert_p: EN 1090-1/2 EXC3 (yapısal çelik), EN ISO 3834-2 (kaynak kalitesi). WPQR tabanlı WPS kütüphanesi; kaynakçılar EN ISO 9606-1/2. NDT personeli EN ISO 9712 Seviye 2.
tr.cap_mat_p: S235–S960QL, Strenx/HARDOX aşınma çelikleri, S700MC, 304/316L paslanmaz ve seçili alüminyum alaşımları — her grup için onaylı WPS ve ısı kontrolü planı.
tr.cap_proc_p: MIG/MAG, TIG, örtülü elektrod; CNC plazma/lazer/giyotin kesim; abkant büküm; mekanik montaj. Kritik dikişlerde VT, PT, MT, UT; RT anlaşmalı laboratuvar.
tr.cap_sla_p: Teknik dosya incelemesi sonrası ortalama 48 saat içinde yazılı teklif: malzeme, WPS özeti, NDT planı ve termin. NDA standart; ihracat sevkiyatı koordinasyonu mümkün.
tr.cap_contact_p: DWG/DXF/PDF ve malzeme bilgisi ile iletişim formu veya info@armaweld.com — mühendis ekibi 48 saat içinde geri döner.
tr.contact_lede: Teknik resminizi veya proje özetinizi paylaşın; 48 saat içinde kapsamlı fiyat teklifimizi iletelim.
tr.contact_success_p: 48 saat içinde teknik ekibimiz size geri dönecektir.

en.home_ref_h2: From welded fabrication to NDT reports, under one roof.

en.home_persona2_d: WPS, WPQR, NDT records and material certs in the delivery dossier — no gaps at audit.

en.why2_d: Production control, traceability and CE dossier from one data chain.

en.footer_capability: EN ISO 3834-2 · EN 1090 EXC3 · 4 NDT methods · 48-hour quote
en.about_h1:
Facility commissioned in 2026.
Deep engineering discipline, new production line.
en.about_lede: ArmaWeld started operations in 2026 at our new Karatay/Konya site. Our team spent years in welding engineering across OEM and process plants; today we offer the same discipline under one roof — welding, cutting, bending, assembly and NDT. We lead with process, documentation and traceability rather than inflated project counts.
en.cap_title_tag: Production Capability — ArmaWeld | EN 1090 EXC3 · EN ISO 3834-2
en.cap_meta_desc: ArmaWeld production capability: EN 1090 EXC3 structural steel, EN ISO 3834-2 welding quality, material groups, NDT and 48-hour quoting. 2026 Konya facility.
en.cap_intro: This page summarises what we actually produce at our 2026 Konya facility. We share certificates, material/process scope and quote-to-delivery workflows — not an inflated machine list.
en.cap_cert_p: EN 1090-1/2 EXC3 (structural steel), EN ISO 3834-2 (welding quality). WPQR-based WPS library; welders EN ISO 9606-1/2. NDT staff EN ISO 9712 Level 2.
en.cap_mat_p: S235–S960QL, Strenx/HARDOX wear steels, S700MC, 304/316L stainless and selected aluminium alloys — approved WPS and heat control per group.
en.cap_proc_p: MIG/MAG, TIG, SMAW; CNC plasma/laser/guillotine cutting; press-brake bending; mechanical assembly. VT, PT, MT, UT on critical welds; RT via partner lab.
en.cap_sla_p: Written quote within 48 hours on average after drawing review: material, WPS summary, NDT plan and lead time. NDA standard; export shipping coordination available.
en.cap_contact_p: Use the contact form or info@armaweld.com with DWG/DXF/PDF and material info — engineering responds within 48 hours.

en.contact_success_p: Our technical team will get back to you within 48 hours.

en.blog_wps_cta_p: Share your project's material and thickness range; we will respond within 48 hours with the applicable approved WPS.

de.about_h1:
2026 in Betrieb genommen.
Eingespielte Ingenieurdisziplin, neue Fertigungslinie.
de.about_lede: ArmaWeld nahm 2026 im neuen Werk Karatay/Konya den Betrieb auf. Unser Team brachte jahrelange Schweißtechnik-Erfahrung aus OEM- und Prozessanlagen mit; heute bieten wir dieselbe Disziplin unter einem Dach — Schweißen, Schneiden, Biegen, Montage und NDT. Im Vordergrund stehen Prozess, Dokumentation und Rückverfolgbarkeit — nicht aufgeblähte Projektanzahlen.

fr.about_h1:
Site mis en service en 2026.
Discipline d'ingénierie éprouvée, nouvelle ligne de production.
fr.about_lede: ArmaWeld a démarré en 2026 sur le nouveau site de Karatay/Konya. L'équipe cumule des années d'ingénierie soudage chez des OEM et des procédés ; aujourd'hui nous offrons la même discipline sous un toit — soudage, découpe, pliage, montage et CND. Nous mettons l'accent sur processus, documentation et traçabilité plutôt que sur des volumes de projets gonflés.

fr.cap_cert_p: EN 1090-1/2 EXC3 (charpente), EN ISO 3834-2 (qualité soudage). Bibliothèque WPS sur WPQR ; soudeurs EN ISO 9606-1/2. CND EN ISO 9712 Niveau 2.
fr.cap_mat_p: S235–S960QL, Strenx/HARDOX, S700MC, 304/316L et alliages aluminium sélectionnés — WPS approuvé et contrôle thermique par groupe.
fr.cap_proc_p: MIG/MAG, TIG, MMA ; découpe CNC plasma/laser/guillotine ; pliage ; montage mécanique. VT, PT, MT, UT sur cordons critiques ; RT via labo partenaire.
fr.cap_sla_p: Devis écrit en moyenne sous 48 h après revue des plans : matière, résumé WPS, plan CND et délai. NDA standard ; coordination export possible.
fr.cap_contact_p: Formulaire ou info@armaweld.com avec DWG/DXF/PDF et info matière — l'ingénierie répond sous 48 heures.
fr.contact_lede: Partagez votre plan technique ou résumé de projet ; nous vous livrerons un devis complet sous 48 heures.
fr.contact_success_p: Notre équipe technique vous répondra sous 48 heures.
fr.services_cta_p: Envoyez plans ou échantillon — analyse des coûts et plan de production sous 48 heures.
fr.blog_wps_cta_p: Partagez matière et plage d'épaisseur ; nous répondrons sous 48 heures avec le WPS approuvé applicable.
